# Calculator Edge Cases Test
# Tests boundary conditions and special cases

# Build the calculator server binary
go build -o mcp-calculator-server .

# Test edge cases and boundary conditions
exec mcp-calculator-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"calculate","arguments":{"operation":"add","a":0,"b":0}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"calculate","arguments":{"operation":"multiply","a":1e10,"b":1e10}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"calculate","arguments":{"operation":"divide","a":1,"b":3}},"id":5}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"advanced_math","arguments":{"function":"power","x":2,"y":0}},"id":6}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"advanced_math","arguments":{"function":"power","x":0,"y":0}},"id":7}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"advanced_math","arguments":{"function":"sin","x":0}},"id":8}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"advanced_math","arguments":{"function":"cos","x":1.5708}},"id":9}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"advanced_math","arguments":{"function":"abs","x":-5}},"id":10}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"statistics","arguments":{"numbers":[1]}},"id":11}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"statistics","arguments":{"numbers":[1,1,1,1,1]}},"id":12}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_units","arguments":{"value":0,"from_unit":"celsius","to_unit":"kelvin"}},"id":13}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_units","arguments":{"value":-273.15,"from_unit":"celsius","to_unit":"kelvin"}},"id":14}
EOF

# Verify zero operations
stdout '"result":0'
stdout '"operation":"add"'

# Verify large number multiplication
stdout '"result":1e\+20'

# Verify fraction result
stdout '"result":0.333'

# Verify power edge cases
stdout '"result":1'
stdout '"operation":"power"'

# Verify trigonometric functions
stdout '"result":0'
stdout '"operation":"sin"'
stdout '"result":6.123233995736766e-17'
stdout '"operation":"cos"'

# Verify absolute value
stdout '"result":5'
stdout '"operation":"abs"'

# Verify single element statistics
stdout '"count":1'
stdout '"mean":1'
stdout '"median":1'
stdout '"standard_deviation":0'

# Verify identical elements statistics
stdout '"count":5'
stdout '"mean":1'
stdout '"median":1'
stdout '"standard_deviation":0'

# Verify absolute zero conversion
stdout '"converted_value":273.15'
stdout '"converted_value":0'
